blood_frenzy.name: Blood Frenzy
blood_frenzy.description: Martial skills can bypass cooldowns by sacrificing HP.

necro_sustain.name: Necro Sustain
necro_sustain.description: Restoration spells scale with Dark Voltage.

shadow_crit.name: Shadow Crit
shadow_crit.description: 100% Critical Chance when attacking from Stealth.

chaos_pierce.name: Chaos Pierce
chaos_pierce.description: Spells ignore 50% of target's Protection Voltage.

primal_fury.name: Primal Fury
primal_fury.description: Rage generation is doubled when below 50% HP.

pack_tactics.name: Pack Tactics
pack_tactics.description: Your attacks trigger a coordinated strike from your companion.

momentum_engine.name: Momentum Engine
momentum_engine.description: Movement generates Momentum stacks which increase defense.

holy_radiance.name: Holy Radiance
holy_radiance.description: Martial attacks heal nearby allies for a portion of damage dealt.

harmonic_resonance.name: Harmonic Resonance
harmonic_resonance.description: Song upkeep costs are reduced by Light Voltage.
